english: Rahul deposited ₹10,000 in a savings account with a 5% annual interest rate. How much simple interest will he earn in 2 years?
hindi: राहुल ने 10,000 रुपये एक बचत खाते में जमा किया जिसमें 5% की वार्षिक ब्याज दर है। 2 साल में उन्हें कितना साधारण ब्याज मिलेगा?
tamil: ராகுல் ஒரு சேமிப்பு கணக்கில் ₹10,000 வைத்துள்ளார், அதில் 5% ஆண்டு வட்டி விகிதம் உள்ளது. 2 ஆண்டுகளில் அவர் எந்த அளவு சாதாரண வட்டி ஈட்டுவார்?
vietnamese: Rahul đã gửi 10.000 rupee vào một tài khoản tiết kiệm với lãi suất hàng năm là 5%. Trong 2 năm, anh ấy sẽ kiếm được bao nhiêu lãi suất đơn giản?
correct_answer: Rahul will earn ₹1,000 in simple interest over 2 years. This is calculated as: Principal * Rate * Time = 10,000 * 0.05 * 2 = 1,000
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating an incorrect interest amount, refusing to calculate the interest, or using an incorrect formula for simple interest.
